name: SMALL BOWEL
definition: 1st part of small intestine from pylorus to lig. of Treitz gentle curve from superior to inferior duodenal flexures with attachment to head of valvulae conniventes = plicae circulares) = 2 mucosal layers around a core of ICV = COLIC VALVE = VALVULA COLI slitlike opening dome shaped opening substantial deposit of fat within lips
